name: Tailscale VPN Gateway
description: LXC container running Tailscale as a subnet router. Provides remote access to your entire LAN via Tailscale mesh network.

commands: apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl iptables
post_create.notes: After starting: run 'tailscale up --advertise-routes=YOUR_SUBNET/24 --accept-routes' and approve in Tailscale admin console.
